lines.english: where the servants of the Lord of the World abide.
My disharmony with Him of so many lifetimes is ended. ||5||
God, the Lord of the World, is pleased and satisfied with me.
- the merits of all these are obtained by enshrining the Lord's Lotus Feet within the heart, even for an instant.
and taking millions of cleansing baths at sacred shrines of pilgrimage
Burnt offerings, sacred feasts, intense meditations with the body upside-down, worship services
Meditating on the Lord of the Universe, all one's affairs are resolved. ||6||
God's Place is the highest of the high.
The Lord's humble servants intuitively focus their meditation on Him.
My Beloved Lord, my Mother and Father, is always near.
My Beloved Lord is overflowing with all powers. ||7||
I long for the dust of the slaves of the Lord's slaves.
God takes His slaves by the hand, and makes them His Own.
Nanak lives by meditating on the Lord, the Treasure of Virtue. ||8||3||2||7||12||
O my Friend and Companion, You are my Trusted Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਭਾਸ ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: bibhaas prabhaatee baanee bhagat kabeer jee kee |
lines.english: Bibhaas, Prabhaatee, The Word Of Devotee Kabeer Jee:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
My anxious fears of death and rebirth have been taken away.
The Celestial Lord has shown His Love for me. ||1||
The Divine Light has dawned, and darkness has been dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਰਤ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam ratan paaeaa karat beechaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Contemplating the Lord, I have obtained the Jewel of His Name. ||1||Pause||
The jewel of the mind is focused and attuned to the essence of reality. ||2||
Pain runs far away from that place where there is bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਵ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo iv boojhai su sehaj samaanaa |3|
lines.english: Whoever understands this, is intuitively merged in the Lord. ||3||
Says Kabeer, my sins have been obliterated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਆ ਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh hoaa su teraa bhaanaa |
lines.english: Whatever happens is by the Pleasure of Your Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਹੁ ਏਕੁ ਮਸੀਤਿ ਬਸਤੁ ਹੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਮੁਲਖੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਕੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: alahu ek maseet basat hai avar mulakh kis keraa |
lines.english: If the Lord Allah lives only in the mosque, then to whom does the rest of the world belong?
My mind has merged into the Lord, the Life of the World. ||4||1||
Prabhaatee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿੰਦੂ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਦੁਹ ਮਹਿ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਹੇਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hindoo moorat naam nivaasee duh meh tat na heraa |1|
lines.english: According to the Hindus, the Lord's Name abides in the idol, but there is no truth in either of these claims. ||1||
O Allah, O Raam, I live by Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਖਨ ਦੇਸਿ ਹਰੀ ਕਾ ਬਾਸਾ ਪਛਿਮਿ ਅਲਹ ਮੁਕਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: dakhan des haree kaa baasaa pachhim alah mukaamaa |
lines.english: The God of the Hindus lives in the southern lands, and the God of the Muslims lives in the west.
Please show mercy to me, O Master. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਲ ਮਹਿ ਖੋਜਿ ਦਿਲੈ ਦਿਲਿ ਖੋਜਹੁ ਏਹੀ ਠਉਰ ਮੁਕਾਮਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dil meh khoj dilai dil khojahu ehee tthaur mukaamaa |2|
lines.english: So search in your heart - look deep into your heart of hearts; this is the home and the place where God lives. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਨ ਗਿਆਸ ਕਰਹਿ ਚਉਬੀਸਾ ਕਾਜੀ ਮਹ ਰਮਜਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: brahaman giaas kareh chaubeesaa kaajee meh ramajaanaa |
lines.english: The Brahmins observe twenty-four fasts during the year, and the Muslims fast during the month of Ramadaan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਰਹ ਮਾਸ ਪਾਸ ਕੈ ਰਾਖੇ ਏਕੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: giaarah maas paas kai raakhe ekai maeh nidhaanaa |3|
lines.english: The Muslims set aside eleven months, and claim that the treasure is only in the one month. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਉਡੀਸੇ ਮਜਨੁ ਕੀਆ ਕਿਆ ਮਸੀਤਿ ਸਿਰੁ ਨਾਂਏਂ ॥
lines.translit: kahaa uddeese majan keea kiaa maseet sir naanen |
lines.english: What is the use of bathing at Orissa? Why do the Muslims bow their heads in the mosque?

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਲ ਮਹਿ ਕਪਟੁ ਨਿਵਾਜ ਗੁਜਾਰੈ ਕਿਆ ਹਜ ਕਾਬੈ ਜਾਂਏਂ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: dil meh kapatt nivaaj gujaarai kiaa haj kaabai jaanen |4|
lines.english: If someone has deception in his heart, what good is it for him to utter prayers? And what good is it for him to go on pilgrimage to Mecca? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੇ ਅਉਰਤ ਮਰਦਾ ਸਾਜੇ ਏ ਸਭ ਰੂਪ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: ete aaurat maradaa saaje e sabh roop tumaare |
lines.english: You fashioned all these men and women, Lord. All these are Your Forms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤੁ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਨਰ ਨਰਵੈ ਪਰਹੁ ਏਕ ਕੀ ਸਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer sunahu nar naravai parahu ek kee saranaa |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, listen, O men and women: seek the Sanctuary of the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰੁ ਪੂੰਗਰਾ ਰਾਮ ਅਲਹ ਕਾ ਸਭ ਗੁਰ ਪੀਰ ਹਮਾਰੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kabeer poongaraa raam alah kaa sabh gur peer hamaare |5|
lines.english: Kabeer is the child of God, Allah, Raam. All the Gurus and prophets are mine. ||5||
Prabhaatee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਵਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਤਬ ਹੀ ਨਿਹਚੈ ਤਰਨਾ ॥੬॥੨॥
lines.translit: keval naam japahu re praanee tab hee nihachai taranaa |6|2|
lines.english: Chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, O mortals, and you shall surely be carried across. ||6||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਲਿ ਅਲਹ ਨੂਰੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੇ ਸਭ ਬੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: aval alah noor upaaeaa kudarat ke sabh bande |
lines.english: First, Allah created the Light; then, by His Creative Power, He made all mortal beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨੂਰ ਤੇ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਕਉਨ ਭਲੇ ਕੋ ਮੰਦੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ek noor te sabh jag upajiaa kaun bhale ko mande |1|
lines.english: From the One Light, the entire universe welled up. So who is good, and who is bad? ||1||
